<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate" />
  <title>Research Archive — Ra Intelligence</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg: #0f1117;
      --bg-secondary: #161822;
      --bg-tertiary: #1c1f2e;
      --text-primary: #f0ece4;
      --text-secondary: rgba(240, 236, 228, 0.72);
      --text-tertiary: rgba(240, 236, 228, 0.50);
      --text-muted: rgba(240, 236, 228, 0.32);
      --border-color: rgba(240, 236, 228, 0.08);
      --border-color-hover: rgba(240, 236, 228, 0.14);
      --accent: #d4a853;
      --accent-light: #e8b877;
      --accent-bg: rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.08);
      --success: #6dd49c;
      --warning: #e8c96a;
      --error: #e07060;
      --purple: #b49af0;
      --cyan: #7ec4e0;
      --font-body: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      --shadow-sm: 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16);
      --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
      --radius: 12px;
      --radius-sm: 8px;
    }

    html[data-theme="light"] {
      --bg: #faf9f6;
      --bg-secondary: #f0ede6;
      --bg-tertiary: #e8e4dc;
      --text-primary: #1a1a2e;
      --text-secondary: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.72);
      --text-tertiary: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.50);
      --text-muted: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.32);
      --border-color: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.08);
      --border-color-hover: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.14);
      --accent: #2d3560;
      --accent-light: #3a4575;
      --accent-bg: rgba(45, 53, 96, 0.08);
      --success: #2d5a42; --warning: #8b6d3f; --error: #7d3a2a;
      --purple: #6b5b95; --cyan: #3a6b8f;
      --shadow-sm: 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
      --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
    }

    html, body {
      height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    /* ═══ SPLIT LAYOUT ═══ */
    .app {
      display: flex;
      height: 100vh;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .top-bar {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 12px 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
